title: Anthropic loses appeals court bid to temporarily block Pentagon blacklisting

title: Oil prices plunge below $94 a barrel, on pace for biggest drop since 2020, after U.S. and Iran agree to two-week cease-fire
summary: Oil prices fell sharply following Trump's announcement of a two-week U.S.-Iran ceasefire, marking potentially the largest single-day decline since 2020. The agreement includes Iran's opening of the Strait of Hormuz, providing relief to energy markets. This de-escalation represents a significant shift in geopolitical risk for oil markets.
content: Oil prices were plunging on Wednesday morning after Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week cease-fire.

title: AI's next bottleneck: Why even the best chips made in the U.S. take a round trip to Taiwan
summary: Advanced chip packaging capacity, controlled largely by TSMC and reserved by Nvidia, is emerging as a critical constraint in AI chip production. This lesser-known manufacturing step could become the next major bottleneck limiting AI infrastructure expansion globally. The concentration of packaging capacity highlights vulnerabilities in the semiconductor supply chain.
content: Nvidia has reserved the majority of TSMC’s most advanced packaging capacity. The lesser-known chipmaking step may become the next bottleneck for AI.

zh.title: 人工智能的下一个瓶颈：为什么即使美国制造的最好芯片也要绕道台湾
zh.summary: 由台积电主要控制、被英伟达预留的先进芯片封装产能正成为人工智能芯片生产中的关键制约因素。这一鲜为人知的制造步骤可能成为限制全球人工智能基础设施扩展的下一个主要瓶颈。封装产能的集中突显了半导体供应链中的脆弱性。

title: Dow futures soar 1,300 points as traders rush to buy stocks after U.S. and Iran reach two-week ceasefire: Live updates
summary: Stock market futures surged following the announcement of a two-week U.S.-Iran ceasefire, with traders rapidly buying equities in response to reduced geopolitical tension. The agreement includes Iran's commitment to open the Strait of Hormuz, bolstering investor confidence. Markets are rallying on optimism from the de-escalation.
content: Trump noted that the "double sided" ceasefire was contingent on Iran agreeing to an opening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗达成为期两周停火协议后，交易员争相买入，道指期货飙升1300点：实时更新
zh.summary: 在宣布为期两周的美国和伊朗停火协议后，股指期货飙升，交易员迅速买入股票以应对地缘政治紧张局势的缓解。该协议包括伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，增强了投资者信心。市场因局势降级的乐观情绪而上涨。

title: Trump threatens tariffs of 50% on countries 'supplying military weapons to Iran'
summary: President Trump announced plans to impose 50% tariffs on goods from nations supplying military weapons to Iran in response to the ongoing conflict. The threat aims to pressure international actors supporting Iran during ceasefire negotiations. This represents an expansion of U.S. trade policy leverage related to the Iran situation.
content: President Donald Trump says the U.S. will impose tariffs of 50% on goods imported to the country from any nation "supplying military weapons to Iran".

zh.title: 特朗普威胁对"向伊朗供应军事武器"的国家征收50%的关税
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布计划对向伊朗供应军事武器的国家征收50%的关税，以应对持续的冲突。这一威胁旨在施压国际社会中支持伊朗的行为体，在停火谈判中获得优势。这代表了美国与伊朗局势相关的贸易政策杠杆的扩展。

title: Alibaba launches data center with 10,000 of its own chips as China ramps up AI push
summary: Alibaba and China Telecom launched a new data center in China equipped with 10,000 of Alibaba's proprietary chips for AI training and inference operations. The move reflects China's effort to strengthen domestic AI capabilities and reduce reliance on foreign chip manufacturers. This facility represents a significant investment in China's competitive AI infrastructure.
content: Alibaba and China Telecom launched a data center in China designed for AI training and inferencing.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴推出配备10000块自研芯片的数据中心，中国加速推进人工智能发展
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴与中国电信推出了一个配备10000块阿里巴巴自有芯片的新数据中心，用于人工智能训练和推理运算。此举反映了中国加强国内人工智能能力、减少对外国芯片制造商依赖的努力。该设施代表了中国在竞争性人工智能基础设施上的重大投资。

title: Roth Capital downgrades these six energy stocks after U.S.-Iran war ceasefire
summary: Following indications that the Iran conflict is de-escalating due to the ceasefire agreement, Roth Capital downgraded several energy stocks including Diamondback Energy. The downgrades reflect analyst concerns that reduced geopolitical tension will lower oil prices and energy sector valuations. Investors are repositioning away from energy stocks given the improved security outlook.
content: Roth Capital downgraded a few energy stocks, including Diamondback Energy, following signs that the Iran war is winding down, its analysts' new note shows.

zh.title: 美伊战争停火后，罗斯资本下调六只能源股评级
zh.summary: 由于停火协议表明伊朗冲突正在逐步缓解，罗斯资本下调了包括菱钻能源在内的几只能源股的评级。这些下调反映了分析师们的担忧，即地缘政治紧张局势的缓解将降低油价和能源行业估值。鉴于安全前景改善，投资者正在调整投资组合，减少对能源股的配置。

title: Markets looking ‘through the noise’ of Iran war — but key questions remain, says JPMorgan
summary: JPMorgan analysts note that markets are discounting some immediate geopolitical risks from the Iran situation, but significant negotiations remain between Washington and Tehran with conflicting demands from both sides. The ceasefire could still unravel depending on diplomatic outcomes. These negotiations will materially impact market performance going forward.
content: There is still a lot of negotiating ahead, with conflicting demands from Washington and Tehran, according to the analysts

zh.title: 摩根大通：市场在伊朗战争"噪音"中向前看，但关键问题仍存
zh.summary: 摩根大通分析师指出，市场正在消化伊朗局势带来的部分地缘政治风险，但华盛顿与德黑兰之间仍存在重大谈判，双方要求相互矛盾。停火协议可能因外交结果而破裂。这些谈判将对市场表现产生重大影响。

title: Delta CEO says airline will 'meaningfully' cut growth plans, sees $300 million boost from its refinery
summary: Delta Air Lines plans to meaningfully reduce its growth projections as rising fuel costs pressure profitability, though it expects a $300 million benefit from its refinery operations. The airline is adjusting capacity plans to manage expenses in the current high-fuel-cost environment. Cost management has become a key strategic priority for the carrier.
content: Delta is scaling back its flight plans as fuel costs grow to reduce its expenses.

zh.title: 达美航空首席执行官表示将"大幅"削减增长计划，炼油厂带来3亿美元收益
zh.summary: 达美航空计划由于燃料成本上升而大幅减少增长预期，但预计从炼油厂业务中获得3亿美元收益。在当前高油价环境下，该航空公司正调整运力计划以管理成本。成本管理已成为该航空公司的关键战略优先事项。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta Air Lines, Levi Strauss, Exxon Mobil & more
summary: Major stocks including Delta Air Lines, Levi Strauss, and Exxon Mobil posted significant premarket price movements following the ceasefire announcement and overnight market developments. The moves reflect investor repositioning across multiple sectors responding to changed risk conditions. Airlines, consumer stocks, and energy firms are experiencing notable trading activity.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 股票盘前最大涨跌幅：达美航空、李维斯、埃克森美孚等
zh.summary: 包括达美航空、李维斯和埃克森美孚在内的主要股票在停火宣布和隔夜市场发展后出现重大盘前价格波动。这些波动反映了投资者在多个行业的重新配置，以应对风险条件的变化。航空公司、消费股和能源公司经历了显著的交易活动。

title: Delta’s stock soars after a well-timed earnings report showed higher fuel costs weren’t an issue
summary: Delta Air Lines' stock surged following an earnings report that exceeded expectations despite higher fuel costs impacting the airline industry overall. Strong operational performance offset traditional headwinds from elevated fuel prices. The positive results coincided with the Iran ceasefire announcement, which improved broader market sentiment.
content: Delta had better-than-expected earnings reported after the Iran cease-fire was announced.

zh.title: 达美航空股价在业绩报告后飙升，燃料成本不再是问题
zh.summary: 达美航空股价在超出预期的业绩报告后飙升，尽管燃料成本更高对航空业整体造成了影响。强劲的运营表现抵消了燃料价格上升带来的传统阻力。积极的结果与伊朗停火公告相吻合，改善了更广泛的市场情绪。

title: Homebuyer mortgage demand drops annually for the first time in over a year, as war fuels uncertainty
summary: First-time declines in homebuyer mortgage demand in over a year have been driven by weakening consumer confidence amid the Iran conflict and broader economic uncertainty. Rising mortgage rates and reduced lending product availability have further dampened housing market demand. The geopolitical crisis is spreading its economic impact beyond energy to consumer spending.
content: Weakening consumer sentiment in the overall economy is weighing heavily on mortgage demand from both homeowners and homebuyers.

zh.title: 购房者抵押贷款需求首次年度下降超一年，战争加剧了不确定性
zh.summary: 购房者抵押贷款需求在一年多以来首次下降，这是由伊朗冲突中消费者信心下降和更广泛的经济不确定性推动的。抵押贷款利率上升和贷款产品供应减少进一步抑制了房地产市场需求。地缘政治危机正在将其经济影响从能源扩展到消费支出。

title: Exxon and Shell reveal production hit from Iran war
summary: Major oil producers Exxon Mobil and Shell each disclosed significant production losses from the Iran conflict in their first quarter results. The disruptions highlight how regional geopolitical events can materially impact global energy supplies. Both companies are assessing ongoing operational impacts from the regional instability.
content: Integrated oil majors Exxon Mobil and Shell each revealed how the Iran war hurt production in the first quarter.

zh.title: 埃克森美孚和壳牌公开伊朗战争对产量的影响
zh.summary: 主要油气生产商埃克森美孚和壳牌各自在第一季度业绩中披露了伊朗冲突造成的重大产量损失。这些中断突显了地区地缘政治事件如何能够对全球能源供应产生实质性影响。两家公司正在评估地区不稳定性对其持续运营的影响。

title: UK house prices fall as Iran war uncertainty dampens demand
summary: UK house prices are declining as uncertainty from the Iran conflict dampens property demand and investor sentiment. Rising mortgage rates and the disappearance of competitive lending options have exacerbated the slowdown in the housing market. Residential real estate weakness is spreading across major developed economies.
content: Mortgage rates have been rising and hundreds of the cheapest deals have disappeared over the last month.

zh.title: 伊朗战争不确定性抑制需求 英国房价下跌
zh.summary: 英国房价因伊朗冲突带来的不确定性而下降,打击了房产需求和投资者信心。抵押贷款利率上升和竞争性贷款选项的消失加剧了房地产市场的放缓。住宅房地产疲软正在主要发达经济体中蔓延。

title: The price Americans pay for medicine has gotten horribly out of control. Here’s how to fix it.
summary: Healthcare costs in America have escalated significantly beyond reasonable levels, with pharmacy benefit managers playing a key role in restricting access and inflating medication prices. Regulatory reforms limiting the power of these intermediaries could provide meaningful relief to consumers. Policy solutions are available but require legislative action to implement effectively.
content: We can start with laws that limit the power of pharmacy-benefit managers

zh.title: 美国人支付的药物价格已经失控。这是解决方法。
zh.summary: 美国医疗成本已大幅上升至不合理水平,药房福利管理公司在限制药物获取和推高药价方面发挥了关键作用。限制这些中介机构权力的监管改革可以为消费者提供有意义的救济。政策解决方案是可行的,但需要立法行动才能有效实施。

title: Sánchez to Trump: Spain won’t ‘applaud those who set the world on fire just because they then show up with a bucket’
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has positioned himself as a leading European critic of U.S. and Israeli military actions against Iran during the ongoing conflict. His comments suggest European concerns about the escalatory nature of the strikes and their role in prolonging regional instability. The criticism reflects broader EU hesitation about the strategic approach to the Iran situation.
content: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has emerged as one of the European Union's leading critics of U.S. and Israeli strikes against Iran.

zh.title: 桑切斯对特朗普说:西班牙不会为纵火者事后拿来救火桶而鼓掌
zh.summary: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯已将自己定位为美国和以色列在伊朗冲突中军事行动的主要欧洲批评者。他的评论表明欧洲对这些打击的升级性质及其延长区域不稳定角色的担忧。这种批评反映了欧盟对伊朗局势战略方针的更广泛保留态度。

title: India's central bank warns of Iran war-fueled inflation, growth risks as it keeps policy rates steady
summary: India's central bank is addressing growth risks and inflation pressures stemming from the Iran war, which has increased energy costs and disrupted global supplies. The central bank kept policy rates steady while managing these competing concerns.
content: India’s central bank needs to weigh growth risks and inflation pressures from the Iran war as higher energy costs and supply disruptions mount.

zh.title: 印度中央银行警告伊朗战争引发的通货膨胀和增长风险，同时保持政策利率不变
zh.summary: 印度中央银行正在应对伊朗战争造成的增长风险和通胀压力，该战争导致能源成本上升并中断了全球供应。中央银行在管理这些相互矛盾的关切的同时保持了政策利率不变。

title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire relief rally lifts global assets as oil plunges below $100
summary: A 2-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad relief rally across global risk assets, with oil prices falling below $100 per barrel. The agreement also boosted traditional safe-haven assets as investors reduced geopolitical hedges.
content: A 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran sparked a broad-based relief rally across risk assets, and even buoying traditional safe havens.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议缓解性上涨推高全球资产，油价跌至100美元以下
zh.summary: 美伊之间为期两周的停火协议引发了全球风险资产的广泛缓解性上涨，油价跌至每桶100美元以下。该协议也推高了传统避险资产，因为投资者减少了地缘政治对冲。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's truce sparks global relief rally
summary: Stock futures surged and oil prices plunged following the Trump administration's announcement of a 2-week ceasefire with Tehran. The agreement offers temporary relief from geopolitical tensions affecting energy markets.
content: Stock futures surge and oil prices plunge as the Trump administration and Tehran agree a 2-week ceasefire.

zh.title: CNBC每日开市：特朗普的休战协议引发全球缓解性上涨
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布与德黑兰达成为期两周的停火协议后，股指期货飙升，油价暴跌。该协议为受地缘政治紧张局势影响的能源市场提供了临时缓解。

title: Foodbank hub set to expand to meet growing demand
summary: Stratford Foodbank is preparing to move to a larger facility to meet growing demand for its food assistance services. The expansion reflects increasing community need for support.
content: Stratford Foodbank is preparing to move to a larger unit, to meet growing demand for its services.

zh.title: 粮食库中心准备扩展以满足不断增长的需求
zh.summary: 斯特拉特福德粮食库正在准备搬迁到更大的设施，以满足不断增长的食品援助服务需求。这次扩展反映了社区日益增加的支持需求。

title: Jet fuel supply concerns grow as war with Iran drags on, airlines cut flights
summary: Jet fuel prices have nearly doubled in the U.S. since military operations against Iran intensified, prompting airlines to reduce flights. Supply concerns are expected to persist as the conflict continues.
content: Fuel prices have nearly doubled in the U.S. since the United States and Israel attacked Iran.

zh.title: 随着与伊朗的战争持续，喷气燃料供应担忧加剧，航空公司削减航班
zh.summary: 自从对伊朗的军事行动加强以来，美国的喷气燃料价格几乎翻倍，促使航空公司减少航班。预计随着冲突继续，供应担忧将持续。

title: Gulf countries scramble to intercept missiles hours into U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement
summary: Gulf region countries reported intercepting ballistic missiles and drones from Iran hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a 2-week ceasefire agreement. The continued military activity raised immediate questions about the ceasefire's stability.
content: Many Middle Eastern countries continued to report incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran on Wednesday, within hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a two-week ceasefire.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议生效数小时后，海湾国家争相拦截导弹
zh.summary: 美伊宣布为期两周的停火协议数小时后，海湾地区国家报告称成功拦截了来自伊朗的弹道导弹和无人机。持续的军事活动立即引发了对停火协议稳定性的质疑。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets cheer as Trump and Tehran agree to 2-week ceasefire
summary: Global markets rallied after President Trump announced a 2-week ceasefire with Iran and Tehran signaled plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The agreement eased investor concerns about sustained energy supply disruptions.
content: Markets are rejoicing after President Donald Trump announced a two week cease-fire with Iran and Tehran signaled a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普与德黑兰同意2周停火 市场欢呼雀跃
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布与伊朗达成2周停火协议，德黑兰表示计划重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后，全球市场上扬。该协议缓解了投资者对能源供应持续中断的担忧。

title: South Korea stocks lead gains in Asia as U.S.-Iran agree to a ceasefire
summary: Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran, which boosted Asian markets at open. This agreement delays planned U.S. military action and provides time for diplomatic negotiations between the two countries.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher after President Donald Trump said he agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.

zh.title: 韩国股票在美伊停火协议下领涨亚洲
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成两周停火协议，推动亚洲市场开盘走高。该协议延迟了计划中的美国军事行动，为两国间的外交谈判提供了时间。

title: Stock futures surge, oil prices slide as Trump announces two-week cease-fire with Iran
summary: Following Trump's announcement of a two-week Iran ceasefire, U.S. stock futures jumped while oil prices fell. The deal delays planned American military action and allows time for diplomatic negotiations.
content: U.S. stock futures jumped and oil prices fell on Tuesday evening, after President Donald Trump announced a two-week-long cease-fire deal with Iran that would delay a planned American bombing assault on the country and make more time for negotiations between the two sides.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布与伊朗两周停火后，股指期货上涨，油价下跌
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布与伊朗达成两周停火后，美国股指期货跳涨，油价下跌。该协议延迟了计划中的美国军事行动，为外交谈判争取了时间。

title: Oil prices plunge below $100 after Iran agrees to safe passage through Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
summary: Oil prices dropped below $100 per barrel after Iran agreed to allow safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz during the ceasefire period. Trump reached the deal following discussions with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
content: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.

zh.title: 伊朗同意停火期间允许通过霍尔木兹海峡后，油价跌破100美元
zh.summary: 伊朗同意在停火期间允许通过霍尔木兹海峡后，油价跌至每桶100美元以下。特朗普在与巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫进行讨论后达成了该协议。

title: Trump faces calls for removal over threats to wipe out 'whole civilization' in Iran
summary: Trump's threats to escalate U.S. military action against Iran have prompted calls for his impeachment or removal from office. The statements have intensified concerns about potential escalation in the Middle East.
content: President Donald Trump's threats to ramp up the U.S. offensive in Iran prompted calls for his impeachment or removal.

zh.title: 特朗普因威胁摧毁伊朗"整个文明"而面临撤职呼声
zh.summary: 特朗普升级对伊朗军事行动的威胁引发了对其弹劾或撤职的呼声。这些声明加剧了人们对中东可能升级的担忧。

title: Music giant Universal gets $64bn takeover offer
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square has made a $64 billion takeover offer for Universal Music Group, which represents major artists including Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter. The offer represents a potential major consolidation in the music industry.
content: The music giant behind acts such as Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter gets an offer from Bill Ackman's Pershing Square.

zh.title: 音乐巨头环球唱片获得640亿美元收购要约
zh.summary: 比尔·艾克曼的Pershing Square向环球音乐集团提出了640亿美元的收购要约，该公司代表包括泰勒·斯威夫特和莎布丽娜·卡彭特等主要艺术家。这项要约代表了音乐行业可能的重大整合。

title: Trump-Iran agree to two-week ceasefire, plan to open Strait of Hormuz
summary: Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran following a request from Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif for a diplomatic delay. The agreement includes plans to open the Strait of Hormuz for the ceasefire period.
content: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif had asked Trump for a two-week delay of his Iran deadline, and for the Strait of Hormuz to open for the same period.

zh.title: 特朗普与伊朗同意两周停火，计划开放霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 在巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫要求外交延期后，特朗普与伊朗达成了为期两周的停火协议。该协议包括在停火期间开放霍尔木兹海峡的计划。
